title: Medications
descriptionDetail: Search for medications using SNOMED CT — the international clinical terminology standard. These are included in your International Patient Summary (IPS) export as the Medication Summary.
privacy: Your medications are stored locally on this device and only included in the IPS when you export it.
noMedications: No medications recorded yet. Add your first medication to build your medication history.

form.title: Add a Medication
form.searchHint: Type at least 2 characters to search SNOMED CT pharmaceutical products.
form.searchError: Could not reach the terminology server. Check your connection and try again.
form.noResults: No matching medications found. Try different search terms.
form.endDateHint: Leave blank if this medication is ongoing.
form.notesPlaceholder: Any additional details about this medication...
